text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
It's gotta be big, like BOOM, KABLAM! Also... I wanna do something
that feels fast!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Um, we're talking about our plan for the special concert, right?
Gotta admit, I'm not getting a concert feel from what you just said.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
By "boom" and "kablam," I presume she's looking for something with
impact. As for "fast," well...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
We could prepare a float decorated with lights for a few participants
to pull and run with.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's a good idea. I so love your think-first-act-later attitude,
Ikuno!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Haha, they seem to be having a lot of fun over there. Well, we'll do
our best to come up with a plan too!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I-I don't know if I have as free an imagination as the older students,
but I'll try!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We'll do our best to make this important commemorative concert a
success!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I like that enthusiasm! Let's start by talking about what color
shutter shades we want to wear!
